svg.title: Project A — Field Report System Architecture
svg.desc: Serverless AWS architecture for a field report submission system. Mobile form submits to API Gateway, Lambda processes and stores to DynamoDB, SNS notifies office, CloudWatch monitors, all provisioned with Terraform and deployed via GitHub Actions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the mobile web form for field report submission')
g.text: Field tech fills out report on phone

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about API Gateway in this architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Lambda function in this architecture')

svg.text: ↓ writes to DynamoDB ↓ publishes to SNS ↓ (optional) Bedrock/Textract

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is DynamoDB structured for field reports?')
sendPrompt('How does the AI layer work in Project A?')
sendPrompt('How does SNS notification work in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does CloudWatch monitor in this project?')
sendPrompt('What secrets are stored in Secrets Manager for this project?')
sendPrompt('What IAM roles are needed for this project?')
sendPrompt('What is S3 used for in this project?')
sendPrompt('How does the GitHub Actions pipeline work for this project?')
sendPrompt('What does Terraform provision in this project?')
